rationale: cfg05 (14.68%, 4 hard months) honestly beats faithful 2.5 ThreeStageLGBM (21.87%, same hard window) -> rich features confirmed better.
Does NOT prove beating 2.5 trusted champion best_two_average (11.85%) because that was measured on an easier single-month window (Feb1-Mar2); different window, not comparable.
Old lgbm_spike_residual 11.27% is INVALIDATED (data leakage) and must not be used as baseline.
Package was missing metrics.json / manifest.json / promotion_decision.json and the original FINAL_REPORT mis-framed 21.87% as 'the 2.5 system' (forbidden comparison).
gate_to_shadow: package completed with metrics.json / manifest.json / promotion_decision.json and corrected FINAL_REPORT
